data.title: American Solar Energy Society held SOLAR 2025 conference in Colorado, inviting the public to join National Solar Tour in Oct. SOLAR 2026 will be in Austin.
data.description: In Boulder, Colorado, on August 4-6, 2025, the American Solar Energy Society organized SOLAR 2025, the 54th annual National Solar Conference at the University of Colorado Boulder. The event convened various stakeholders including thought leaders, innovators, and policymakers to discuss the future of solar energy.

data.title: Ethereum Stash close to $8B as ETH reaches record high.
data.description: The recent report reveals that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.8%, showing a significant decrease from the previous month. With a total of 250,000 new jobs added to the economy, the labor market has experienced noticeable growth. Additionally, the report indicates that the average hourly earnings have increased by 3.2% over the last year. This positive trend suggests a strengthening economy and a hopeful outlook for job seekers.

data.title: Revature wins 2 Gold and 1 Silver in Brandon Hall Group HCM Excellence Awards for Best Learning Practices.
data.description: Revature, a tech talent as a service provider based in Reston, Virginia, has received prestigious recognition in multiple categories. On August 25, 2025, the company was awarded Gold in the Best Use of Blended Learning, Best Learning Measurement, and Best Competencies and Skill Development categories. This acknowledgment highlights Revature's excellence in these areas, showcasing its commitment to innovation and quality in technology training. This achievement further solidifies Revature's position as a leader in the industry.

data.title: Early Bird registration for OpenSSL Conference 2025 in Prague ends in 7 days, happening on October 7-9.
data.description: In Newark, N.J., there are just one week remaining to take advantage of the Early Bird registration for the OpenSSL Conference 2025, scheduled for October 7 – 9 in Prague. This conference will unite professionals such as lawyers, regulators, developers, and entrepreneurs to delve into topics surrounding security and privacy. Secure your spot now to avoid missing out on this opportunity.

data.title: New luxury waterfront condos, Luna at Marina Pointe, launch in Tampa Bay's Westshore Marina District. 151 residences.
data.description: In Tampa, Florida on August 25, 2025, Marina Pointe has introduced Luna at Marina Pointe in response to the increasing need for luxury waterfront condos. Luna is situated in the acclaimed Westshore Marina District spread across 52 acres and comprises 151 residences that aim to set a new benchmark for upscale living by the water.

data.title: Primo Brands partners with River Partners to launch water replenishment project along California rivers, investing in climate resilience.
data.description: On August 25, 2025, a partnership between River Partners and two undisclosed organizations will focus on a project that aims to conserve water, restore habitats, and enhance ecosystems and communities. The initiative, primarily centered on climate resilience, will involve significant long-term investments. The collaboration originates from Tampa, Florida, and Stamford, Connecticut. This transformative effort will have far-reaching impacts on sustainability and environmental preservation.

data.title: Donna Morris, Walmart Inc. EVP and Chief People Officer, joins UKG Board of Directors; expertise will benefit HR tech.
data.description: Donna Morris, the executive vice president and chief people officer at Walmart Inc., has been named to the UKG Board of Directors. UKG is a prominent provider of HR, payroll, and workforce management solutions. Morris brings her extensive experience in overseeing global HR and people operations for Walmart Inc., the largest private employer and retailer worldwide. Her insights into the frontline workforce and the impact of technology and innovation on shaping employee experiences will be highly beneficial for the UKG Board.

data.title: Saritasa survey shows 62% of US businesses use legacy software; 43% cite security concerns. 68% rely on internal IT for maintenance.
data.description: A recent survey conducted by Saritasa in 2025 with 500 U.S. IT professionals sheds light on the prevalent use of outdated software in businesses. The findings show that 62% of organizations still operate on legacy systems, with 43% expressing concerns over security vulnerabilities. Despite the risks, 68% rely on their internal IT teams for maintenance, while 50% refrain from upgrades because they believe their current system is functioning adequately. Among those looking to modernize, 48% prioritize performance enhancements. This underscores the importance of proactively addressing legacy software challenges to avoid potential business impacts. Read more on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Sedgwick names Kalani Reelitz CFO, bringing 20 years of experience to oversee financial operations. #Memphis #leadership
data.description: In Memphis, Tennessee on August 25, 2025, Sedgwick, a prominent risk and claims administration company, revealed the appointment of Kalani Reelitz as their latest Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Reelitz's extensive background spanning over two decades equips her to manage all financial facets within Sedgwick with proficiency.
Germany calls for probe into Israeli airstrike on Gaza hospital

data.title: C2N Diagnostics expands PrecivityAD2™ Alzheimer’s blood test use to patients 50+, aiding in early diagnosis.
data.description: In St. Louis, clinicians can now utilize the PrecivityAD2™ blood test to assist in diagnosing early-onset Alzheimer’s disease in patients aged 50 to 55 with cognitive issues. This test aids in detecting amyloid plaques in the brain, a key indicator of Alzheimer's disease, and supports medical professionals in making treatment decisions. This development allows for expanded screening of a population at risk, providing valuable insights for medical management.

data.title: AMIGO LNG signs 15-year LNG deal with Macquarie Group. Joint venture of Epcilon LNG and LNG Alliance.
data.description: Today, in Houston, on August 25, 2025, AMIGO LNG S.A. de C.V. disclosed its agreement with Macquarie Group for a long-term Sale and Purchase Agreement (SPA). AMIGO LNG, a Mexican joint venture involving Epcilon LNG LLC from Texas and LNG Alliance from Singapore, finalized this deal. This announcement marks a significant move in the energy industry, with the involvement of these key players.

data.title: Lenny Kravitz will headline 2025 Bahamas Culinary & Arts Festival by Baha Mar, returning Oct 22-26. Tickets on sale now.
data.description: Get your tickets now for the annual event happening from October 22nd to the 26th. The stellar lineup includes top chefs, talented artists, and a special performance by Lenny Kravitz. Taking place in NASSAU, The Bahamas, this year's event promises to be unforgettable. Baha Mar, the premier resort destination in the Caribbean, is hosting this event which will feature world-renowned personalities.
